name: Auto Lint on Save
description: Runs ESLint --fix automatically whenever a file is saved, keeping code style consistent without manual intervention.
author: anthropics

name: Session Timer
description: Logs session start time and displays elapsed duration, helping track how long coding sessions last.
author: example

name: Prompt Guardrails
description: Validates user prompts against a set of safety rules before submission, preventing accidental destructive commands.
author: example

name: Tool Usage Logger
description: Logs every tool invocation to a local JSON file for auditing and usage analytics.
author: example

name: Permission Slack Notifier
description: Sends a Slack webhook notification whenever Claude requests elevated permissions, keeping the team informed.
author: example

name: Subagent Resource Limiter
description: Enforces memory and CPU limits when subagents spawn, preventing runaway resource consumption.
author: example

name: Context Summary
description: Injects a structured summary prompt before context compaction, ensuring critical information is preserved.
author: example

name: Git Worktree Setup
description: Automatically installs dependencies and sets up environment files when a new git worktree is created.
author: example

name: CWD Env Loader
description: Loads project-specific environment variables from .env files whenever the working directory changes.
author: example

name: Pre-Tool Validator
description: Uses an LLM to validate tool arguments before execution, catching potentially harmful operations early.
author: example

name: Session Cleanup
description: Cleans up temporary files and resets environment state when a coding session ends.
author: example

name: Stop Failure Reporter
description: Reports stop failures to an external monitoring endpoint for debugging and reliability tracking.
author: example

name: Desktop Alert
description: Displays native OS desktop notifications for important Claude Code events, even when the terminal is in the background.
author: example

name: Teammate Idle Ping
description: Sends a webhook ping when a teammate agent goes idle, enabling orchestration of multi-agent workflows.
author: example

name: Instructions Injector
description: Dynamically appends project-specific instructions when CLAUDE.md files are loaded, customizing behavior per-repo.
author: example
